page_content:
CRIMINAL JUSTICE MINOR AT SHADY GROVE

The Universities at Shady Grove

9636 Gudelsky Drive

5105 Camille Kendall Academic Center (Building III)

Rockville, MD 20850

Phone: 301-738-6307

ccjsusg@umd.edu

http://shadygrove.umd.edu/academics/degree-programs/ba-criminology- and-criminal-justice/

Program Director: Wendy Stickle, Ph.D.

The Minor in Criminal Justice offers non-CCJS majors at Shady Grove the opportunity to learn more about the criminal justice system and the challenges it faces. Students who complete the minor will have a better understanding of how the criminal justice system, including police, courts, and corrections, operates, its strengths and weaknesses. Students will also be exposed to emerging topics such as forensics, homeland security, elder abuse and human trafﬁcking.
